inputs.label: Viewing Distance (ft)
inputs.businessContext: Standard viewing distance for Snellen chart in feet

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard viewing distance for Snellen chart in feet
businessContext_i18n.tr: Snellen tablosu için fit cinsinden standart görüş mesafesi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de vision standard pour le tableau de Snellen en pieds
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de visualización estándar para la tabla de Snellen en pies
businessContext_i18n.ar: مسافة الرؤية القياسية لجدول سنلن بالقدم

inputs.label: Letter Size Distance (ft)
inputs.businessContext: Distance at which a person with normal vision can read the same line, in feet

label_i18n.es: Distancia del tamaño de la letra (pies)

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance at which a person with normal vision can read the same line, in feet
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal görüşe sahip bir kişinin aynı satırı okuyabildiği fit cinsinden mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand, in dem eine Person mit normalem Sehvermögen dieselbe Zeile lesen kann, in Fuß
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance à laquelle une personne ayant une vision normale peut lire la même ligne, en pieds
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia a la que una persona con visión normal puede leer la misma línea, en pies
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة التي يستطيع عندها الشخص ذو الرؤية الطبيعية قراءة نفس السطر، بالقدم

inputs.label: Viewing Distance (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard viewing distance for metric Snellen chart in meters

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard viewing distance for metric Snellen chart in meters
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrik Snellen tablosu için metre cinsinden standart görüş mesafesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Betrachtungsabstand für metrische Snellen-Tafel in Metern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de vision standard pour le tableau de Snellen métrique en mètres
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de visualización estándar para la tabla de Snellen métrica en metros
businessContext_i18n.ar: مسافة الرؤية القياسية لجدول سنلن المتري بالأمتار

inputs.label: Letter Size Distance (m)
inputs.businessContext: Distance at which a person with normal vision can read the same line, in meters

label_i18n.es: Distancia del tamaño de la letra (m)

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance at which a person with normal vision can read the same line, in meters
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal görüşe sahip bir kişinin aynı satırı okuyabildiği metre cinsinden mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand, in dem eine Person mit normalem Sehvermögen dieselbe Zeile lesen kann, in Metern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance à laquelle une personne ayant une vision normale peut lire la même ligne, en mètres
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia a la que una persona con visión normal puede leer la misma línea, en metros
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة التي يستطيع عندها الشخص ذو الرؤية الطبيعية قراءة نفس السطر، بالأمتار

inputs.label: Target Decimal Acuity
inputs.businessContext: Optional: desired decimal acuity for reverse calculation of required letter distance

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: desired decimal acuity for reverse calculation of required letter distance
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: gerekli harf mesafesinin ters hesaplaması için istenen ondalık görme keskinliği
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: gewünschte Dezimalsehschärfe für Rückwärtsberechnung des erforderlichen Buchstabenabstands
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : acuité décimale souhaitée pour le calcul inverse de la distance de lettre requise
businessContext_i18n.es: Opcional: agudeza decimal deseada para el cálculo inverso de la distancia de letra requerida
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختياري: حدة البصر العشرية المطلوبة لحساب عكسي لمسافة الحرف المطلوبة

formulas.decimalAcuity: (viewingFeet > 0 && letterFeet > 0) ? viewingFeet / letterFeet : (viewingMeters > 0 && letterMeters > 0) ? viewingMeters / letterMeters : 1
formulas.MAR_arcmin: 1 / ((viewingFeet > 0 && letterFeet > 0) ? viewingFeet / letterFeet : (viewingMeters > 0 && letterMeters > 0) ? viewingMeters / letterMeters : 1)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
